description:
Odilon-Gbènoukpo Singbo - Creed and Its Modern-Day Alternatives

International Conference "Christianity AD 2054 ii: Creed and the Challenges of the Future"
10 / 9 / 2025
Zagreb, Croatia

Organizer: Institute for Culture of Thinking
Co-organizers: Faculty of Philosophy and Religious Studies, University of Zagreb / Faculty of Orthodox Theology St. Clement of Ohrid, Ss. Cyril and Methodius University of Skopje / Faculty of Theology, University of Ljubljana
